flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Mohave Community College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (62.1% → 49.3%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mohave Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.0k → $8.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mohave Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mohave Community College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6k → 3.2k).
